name: Lato
acquisitionDetail: Buy for 25,000 Credits from the Market
tierNote: Starter weapon, pure mastery fodder

name: Braton
acquisitionDetail: Buy for 25,000 Credits from the Market
tierNote: Starter rifle, mastery fodder

name: MK1-Braton
acquisitionDetail: Buy for 25,000 Credits from the Market or starting weapon
tierNote: Pure mastery fodder, replace ASAP

name: Boltor
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (25,000 Credits). Easy to craft.
tierNote: Strong with Incarnon Genesis adapter — one of the best primary Incarnons

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.source: Venus, Ceres, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna

name: Paris
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (25,000 Credits).
tierNote: Excellent with Incarnon Genesis — one of the top status bows. Highest status chance of all bows in Incarnon form.

name: Latron
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (35,000 Credits).
tierNote: SS-tier Incarnon — best primary Incarnon for raw stopping power. Can be built as crit or armor-strip machine.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.source: Venus, Ceres, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna

name: Torid
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (25,000 Credits).
tierNote: SS-tier Incarnon — most popular Incarnon weapon, excellent crowd clearing with AoE Toxin.

components.name: Rubedo
components.source: Phobos, Earth, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, Void

name: Miter
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (25,000 Credits).
tierNote: S-tier Incarnon — direct competitor to Latron for best primary Incarnon. Slightly held back by inconsistent homing.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.source: Venus, Ceres, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna

name: Soma
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (25,000 Credits).
tierNote: Classic high-crit rifle. Still solid, especially with Soma Prime.

components.name: Rubedo
components.source: Phobos, Earth, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, Void

name: Tonkor
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (35,000 Credits).
tierNote: Strong grenade launcher, good for crowd control.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.source: Venus, Ceres, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna

name: Nataruk
acquisitionDetail: Reward from The New War quest. Cannot be traded.
tierNote: One of the best weapons for Steel Path and Arbitrations. Exceptional for high-tier missions.

name: Kuva Bramma
acquisitionDetail: Drop from Kuva Liches. Element and bonus % are random. Requires Kuva Lich system unlock.
tierNote: Massive AoE bow. One of the most powerful primaries in the game for clearing rooms.

name: Kuva Zarr
acquisitionDetail: Drop from Kuva Liches. Element and bonus % are random.
tierNote: Incredible AoE launcher. Top-tier for Steel Path farming.

name: Tenet Arca Plasmor
acquisitionDetail: Drop from Sisters of Parvos. Element and bonus % are random.
tierNote: Exceptional shotgun with huge AoE beams. Excellent for corridor content and Steel Path.

name: Lex
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (25,000 Credits).
tierNote: S-tier Incarnon — highest single-shot burst damage of all Incarnon secondaries. Guarantees Slash DoT with Hemorrhage.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.source: Venus, Ceres, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna

name: Bronco
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (15,000 Credits).
tierNote: Strong Incarnon secondary — synergizes extremely well with Secondary Enervate Arcane.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.source: Venus, Ceres, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna

name: Dual Toxocyst
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (35,000 Credits). Requires Infested Salvage grind for parts.
tierNote: SS-tier Incarnon — built-in Viral on chaining projectiles. One of the most satisfying high-KPM weapons.

name: Laetum
acquisitionDetail: Obtained through the Holdfasts syndicate in the Zariman. Requires completion of Angels of the Zariman quest.
tierNote: S-tier Incarnon — the original meta-setting Incarnon secondary. Exceptional all-rounder.

name: Catchmoon (Kitgun)
acquisitionDetail: Crafted from Kitgun parts purchased from Rude Zuud in Fortuna. Requires standing with Solaris United.
tierNote: Strong kitgun chamber. The Pax Seeker grip combo is popular for general use.

name: Kuva Nukor
acquisitionDetail: Drop from Kuva Liches. Element and bonus % are random. Insanely good with multishot.
tierNote: Possibly the strongest secondary in the game. Chains between enemies, applies status rapidly. Pairs insanely well with Epitaph as a primer.

name: Epitaph
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from The New War quest completion reward.
tierNote: Best-in-class status primer. Pairs with any high-damage weapon to shred everything in Steel Path.

name: MK1-Bo
acquisitionDetail: Buy for 25,000 Credits from the Market or starting weapon.
tierNote: Pure mastery fodder. Replace immediately.

name: Skana
acquisitionDetail: Buy for 25,000 Credits from the Market or starting weapon.
tierNote: Starter sword. Mastery fodder, but can be Incarnon-upgraded.

name: Nami Solo
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (15,000 Credits).
tierNote: Best dagger/machete Incarnon. Full 1.0 Follow-Through lets it shred clumped enemies. Best melee-only Incarnon build.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.source: Venus, Ceres, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna

name: Innodem
acquisitionDetail: Obtained through the Holdfasts syndicate in the Zariman. Requires Angels of the Zariman quest.
tierNote: Best dagger Incarnon. Exceptional KPM weapon if you master aim-glide attacks.

name: Glaive
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (100,000 Credits).
tierNote: Unique thrown melee. Used as a component to craft Glaive Prime parts indirectly. Fun utility weapon.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.source: Venus, Ceres, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna

name: Nikana
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (35,000 Credits). Requires Dragon Nikana quest or crafting via Dojo research.
tierNote: Used as crafting component for Dragon Nikana. Keep until you have Dragon Nikana.

components.name: Rubedo
components.source: Phobos, Earth, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, Void

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.source: Venus, Ceres, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna

name: Lesion
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Market (35,000 Credits). Build components require Infested mob drops.
tierNote: Strong Toxin/Status polearm. Good for applying status in Steel Path.

name: Hate
acquisitionDetail: All parts drop from Stalker as rare drops. Requires Stalker to spawn (which happens when enemies are killed while having a death mark).
tierNote: Iconic scythe with good critical stats. Incarnon available. Rare drop makes it notable to keep.

name: Paracesis
acquisitionDetail: Reward from The Sacrifice quest. Cannot be traded. Requires Swords of Umbra content completion.
tierNote: One of the best heavy blades. Has a unique extra mod capacity and is specifically designed to fight Sentients. Do NOT sell this.

name: Stropha
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Clan Dojo (Tenno Research Lab). Parts drop from Grineer Railjack missions.
tierNote: Top-tier gunblade. Exceptional damage especially with gunblade shots. One of the strongest melee weapons for endgame.

name: Dragon Nikana
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Tenno Research Lab in Clan Dojo. Requires Nikana as a component.
tierNote: Great nikana and used to craft Zaw-like nikana builds. Solid endgame sword with Incarnon potential.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.source: Venus, Ceres, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna

name: Phenmor
acquisitionDetail: Obtained through the Holdfasts syndicate in the Zariman. Requires Angels of the Zariman quest.
tierNote: Excellent Incarnon semi-auto rifle. Strong crit profile with good range.

name: Felarx
acquisitionDetail: Obtained through the Holdfasts syndicate in the Zariman. Requires Angels of the Zariman quest.
tierNote: Top-tier Incarnon shotgun. Insane burst fire in Incarnon form.

name: Dread
acquisitionDetail: All parts drop from Stalker as rare drops. Requires Stalker to spawn via death marks.
tierNote: Iconic Slash-heavy bow. One of the best early-game bows. Incarnon available — competitor to Paris Incarnon.

name: Ignis Wraith
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint from Clan Research or trade from other players. Requires a clan with the research completed.
tierNote: Best flamethrower. Wide cone of fire. Excellent for clearing dense packs, still viable in many Steel Path missions.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.source: Venus, Ceres, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna

name: Cedo
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint reward from The Deadlock Protocol quest. Parts drop from Parvos Granum boss fight.
tierNote: Exceptional status-stacking shotgun. The slime AoE alt-fire applies all statuses instantly. Best-in-class for status builds.

name: Sepulcrum
acquisitionDetail: Blueprint reward from The Deadlock Protocol quest. Parts from Parvos Granum boss.
tierNote: Strong homing secondary. Good all-rounder for intermediate to late game.

name: Tenet Cycron
acquisitionDetail: Drop from Sisters of Parvos. Element and bonus % are random.
tierNote: Excellent beam secondary that chains between enemies. Strong status applicator and damage dealer.

name: Garuda's Talons
acquisitionDetail: Automatically acquired when you obtain Garuda Warframe. Cannot be separated.
tierNote: High slash proc rate. Only accessible while using Garuda. Fun and effective in her kit.
